label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 7

extraction.one_line_summary: SOUPE Geoffrey won a chaotic coastal sprint after leadout plan collapsed, attacking final 350m corner when designated sprinter Van Gestel was absent.
tactical_patterns: Kaden Groves went to intermediate sprint at 35km despite already leading points, unusual energy expenditure before technical finale.
Vingegaard collected bonus seconds at intermediate sprint 35km out, rare GC attention to flat-stage bonifications this early.
Geoffrey Soupe capitalized when designated sprinter Van Gestel couldn't follow through technical finale, domestiques should freelance on chaotic coastal stages.
Final corner at 350m remaining proved decisive positioning point, not traditional 1-2km markers on technical coastal finishes.

rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: negative: crashed out with 5km remaining after hitting already-downed rider, Ineos losing climbing depth before mountain weekend
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: went off-road into cornfield early race, visited medical car for knee check with poor demeanor
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: neutral: won intermediate sprint but disappointed at finish despite extending points lead, possible tactical misjudgment spending energy early
rider_signals.SOUPE Geoffrey: positive: former Bouhanni domestique took career-biggest win when Van Gestel disappeared, shows situational awareness to abandon leadout duties
